creator: nik@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-doc->nate

Nate, I seem to recall you are (or were) Mr Mobile.  Not having 
a laptop, I don't even know if this is appropriate any more. If it 
is, can you reassign it back to -doc, and I'll drop a message in 
-mobile asking for volunteers.  Thanks.
